description.en: The nftables service allows for the loading of nftables rulesets during boot, or starting on the nftables service

rationale.en: The nftables service restores the nftables rules from the rules files referenced in the `/etc/nftables.conf` file during boot or the starting of the nftables service

audit.en:
Run the following command to enable the nftables service:

```
# systemctl enable nftables
```

remediation.en:
Run the following command to enable the nftables service:

```
# systemctl enable nftables
```
